News

We Are Ranked Internationally in Medicine and Health Sciences!

29
						January

2026

The THE World University Rankings by Subject have been announced. As a result of the evaluation covering medicine, dentistry, nursing, and other health-related disciplines, our University has been included in the Medicine World University Rankings 2026. Our University ranked 7th among foundation universities in this field.
